title: Angular wrapper components (was jssm#685)
manager: First-class Angular components wrapping the machine viewer and editor, so Angular apps consume FSL through idiomatic bindings and inputs/outputs instead of hand-wiring the raw web component. It is one target of the wrapper program — the framework-native surface that makes adoption in an Angular shop a drop-in rather than an integration project. (fsl#269, the Angular-renderer row, points here as its live carrier.)
